editorial.caption: Editorial
editorial.code:
Private Sub extraer_Click()
Dim filehandler As String

filehandler = txtEdit.Text

Open "out.txt" For Output As #1
  Print #1, filehandler
Close #1

MsgBox ("Se ha grabado este archivo"), , ("Extraer a archivo")
End Sub

Private Sub salir_Click()
Unload Me
Me.Hide
End Sub
